{{Infobox group
| name = Dreadgod cultists
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dreadgod cultists]] loot and pillage in the wake of their master.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The three [[Dreadgod cultists]] would each have the white of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A tan, white-haired woman glared at the [[Dreadgod cultists]] during the [[Uncrowned ceremony]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
